En: What am I missing? What haven't I done?
Zh: “我错过什么了？还有什么没做的？”

En: We never did that ballistics shit here. He sniffs. "Let's check out where he shot my gimp. You should know that shit, pig."
Zh: “我们这里从来不搞弹道什么的狗屁。”他闷哼一声。“我们找找他是从哪里打中我家瘸子的。你应该知道那些屁事的，猪猡。”

En: Good one, Cuno. It doesn't have to hold in court. Just establish a line of sight and he'll do the rest himself.
Zh: 不错，坤诺。确实没必要送上法庭。只要视线瞄准，他自己会继续做完一切。

En: We can take another look in the mini-tower, where the bed was. He sniffs. "Let's check out where he shot my gimp. Ballistics shit. You should know that, pig."
Zh: “我们可以再去看看那个小塔，就是有床的那个地方。”他闷哼一声。“我们找找他是从哪里打中我家瘸子的。你应该知道那些屁事的，猪猡。”

En: Cuno's in the game. Let's fucking do this, pig. he whispers, excitedly.
Zh: “坤诺决定加入这个游戏。赶快他妈的开始吧，猪猡。”他兴奋地低语。

En: Yes, Cuno can see that. You got this. Think of like... He rubs his nose. "... what *other* shit he's done too. Cuno can tell he's a killer."
Zh: “是啊，坤诺看得到。你可以的。就好像……”他摸了摸鼻子。“……他*还*做了些什么破事。坤诺能看出来，他是个杀人犯。”

En: Good. He nods. "I think it's going really fucking well." He leans closer. "Just cut it with the punching shit, alright? Makes us look like we got nothing."
Zh: “很好。”他点点头。“我觉得一切进展还真他妈的不错。”他又靠近了些。“用那个什么鬼东西把它剪开，明白吗？装着好像我们什么也不知道。”

En: He's into some ancient warrior shit. Hate shit. Pressure cook him. Push it on him, like -- motive shit. Pig style.
Zh: “他对什么古代战士之类的屁事很着迷。狗屁仇恨。他肯定很有压力。给他点压力，比如——作案动机之类的。按照猪猡的方式来。”

En: Good. Talk to him, demonstratively pick it up, then push it along with the other accusations. This is a good idea.
Zh: 很好。跟他聊聊，公开挑明，然后用其他指控推进。这是个好主意。

En: Well. There's the gun, he says, scratching his head... "Why you still haven't picked it up and used it against him is beyond Cuno."
Zh: “这个嘛。有枪啊。”他抓了抓脑袋，开口说到……“你怎么还不把它捡起来，然后用来对付他啊，那就超过坤诺了。”

En: Cuno's in the game. Let's fucking do this, pig. he whispers, excitedly.
Zh: “坤诺决定加入这个游戏。赶快他妈的开始吧，猪猡。”他兴奋地低语。

En: You hear that? He thinks you're very close...
Zh: 听到了吗？他觉得你们很亲近……

En: Also, the gun. The scratches his head. "Why you still haven't picked it up and used it against him is beyond Cuno."
Zh: “还有，那把枪。”他抓了抓脑袋，开口说到……“你怎么还不把它捡起来，然后用来对付他啊，那就超过坤诺了。”

En: Yeah, Cuno can see that, the kid says seriously. "So can fuckin' murderoonie here. You should stop -- it's weird as fuck."
Zh: “是啊，坤诺能看见，”小孩严肃地说到。“那些该死的杀人犯也能。你应该住手——感觉太他妈的诡异了。”

En: Of course -- why didn't *you* think of it?! Motive shit. Pig style.
Zh: 当然——*你*为什么没想到？！狗屁动机什么的。猪猡的风格。

En: Cuno doesn't say anything. Stares out the window. You're on your own.
Zh: 坤诺什么也没说，静静凝视着窗外。你只能靠自己了。

En: Something tells you this is going to be a rough ride.
Zh: 你有种预感，这将会是一趟艰难的旅程。

En: What happened to your art thing?
Zh: “你的艺术品怎么样了？”

En: Locust city? He swallows. "Cuno dropped that art shit coz Cuno's fucking *poor* and has shit for brains."
Zh: “你说蝗城吗？”他吞了吞口水。“坤诺把那个狗屁艺术品弄掉了，因为坤诺他妈的*很穷*，而且脑子里还进屎了。”

En: A truly rare moment of self pity.
Zh: 真正难能可贵的自我怜悯时刻。

En: You better not make Cuno fucking *cry* about his art-shit, okay? Change the subject, Cuno doesn't do that shit no more. Fuck that shit, fuck *everything*.
Zh: “你最好别让坤诺为那个该死的狗屁艺术品流眼泪，明白吗？换个话题，坤诺我他妈的再也不做这种事了。都他妈的滚蛋吧，*一切*全他妈的操蛋。”

En: Apparently he has never formed an opinion on the matter and isn't going to do so on the fly either.
Zh: 很显然，他对这个问题从来没有自己的看法，不工作的时候也不打算这么做。

En: So who's side are you on?
Zh: “所以，你站在哪边？”

En: Small time shit. Got it.
Zh: “不重要的屁事。明白了。”

En: The kid nods, obviously relieved.
Zh: 小孩点点头，显然轻松了不少。

En: Whose side's Cuno on?! His tone gets angry. "Cuno's on fucking Cuno's side, pig! This is beneath the Cuno. Don't talk to me about this playground bullshit. You're getting shit in Cuno's head."
Zh: “坤诺站哪边？！”他的语气变得有些愤怒。“坤诺当然他妈的是站在坤诺这边啊，猪猡！比坤诺低级多了好吗。不要再他妈的跟我说这些废话。你他妈的把坤诺的脑子都搞乱了。”

En: Being put in the spotlight like this makes him feel exposed, makes him lash out.
Zh: 把他放在聚光灯下让他觉得暴露无遗，这会让他抓狂。

En: He was probably collecting tare or stealing stuff that wasn't nailed down.
Zh: 他可能只是捡些破烂，或者偷些没被钉起来的东西。

En: Just don't ask him about it. Boys in that age can be quite sensitive about such matters.
Zh: 别问他了。那个年纪的小男孩对这类事情挺敏感的。

En: It's okay, I like her too.
Zh: “没事的，我也喜欢她。”

En: I'm sorry, Cuno. I'll stop.
Zh: “抱歉，坤诺。我不说了。”

En: Your secret is safe with me, Cuno. (Give him a wink.)
Zh: “我不会把你的秘密说出去的，坤诺。”（朝他眨眨眼。）

En: Lilienne is nice though.
Zh: “想来莉莉恩挺不错的。”

En: About Martinaise...
Zh: “关于马丁内斯……”

En: Well *I* don't, the kid says, pointing to himself with his thumb. "Cuno's got no time for this shit. He's a pig now."
Zh: “*我*没有，”小孩用拇指指着自己。“坤诺没时间管这些屁事。他现在是头猪了。”

En: He tries to keep his voice casual and businesslike, but it trembles ever so slightly.
Zh: 他努力想让自己的声音放松而镇定，但还是能感到微微的颤抖。

En: You fuckin' better, pig! His index finger is pointed straight at you. "We're partners now. You got to be professional with the Cuno."
Zh: “你他妈最好做到，猪猡！”他伸出食指直直地指向你。“现在我们是搭档了。你要对坤诺专业一点。”

En: What fucking secret?! You gotta stop this shit with me! He's trying to control himself. "Cuno's a pig. We're partners now. You got to be professional with the Cuno. Talk sense to him."
Zh: “什么狗屁秘密？！你他妈的最好赶快给我闭嘴！”他努力控制自己。“坤诺是猪猡。我们现在是搭档了。你要对坤诺专业一点。说话要讲道理。”

En: She's okay, the kid suddenly speaks with a high pitched squeak. "I mean... With all the fucking drunks and relics around, she's like the only one who isn't a walking shit hole. She's okay."
Zh: “她还不错，”小孩突然尖尖地提高嗓门。“我是说……周围这么多该死的醉汉，还有死人，她是两条腿的垃圾里面唯一不烂的人。她不错。”

En: Sounds like the kid has a soft spot for Lilienne.
Zh: 看来这个小孩对莉莉恩有好感。

En: Yeah? He places his hands on the hips, waiting for your question.
Zh: “是吗？”他把双手搭在后腰下面，等着你的提问。

En: The kid is admitting falsehood, sire. He just doesn't know.
Zh: 这个孩子在撒谎，大人。他根本不知道。

En: This is the extent of the boy's knowledge.
Zh: 这就是一个小男孩的知识范围。

En: The *Train*. Speed-Train. Amphetamine Express.
Zh: *火车*。思必得号快车。安非他命专列。

En: We still need to get him back, but... yeah. We got our man.
Zh: “我们还要把他带回来，不过……好吧。有我们自己的人。”

En: Makes you proud to be a pig, the kid says. "Oink oink."
Zh: “让你能骄傲的做一头猪，”小孩说到。“哼哼。”

En: Fucking island is spooky as fuck. Cuno never liked it here.
Zh: “该死的岛吓人的跟鬼一样。坤诺从来都不喜欢这里。”

En: Cuno is present on the scene. He looks around with his hands on his hips.
Zh: “坤诺在场”。他双手叉在腰后，看了看周围。

En: Talk to Cuno.
Zh: “跟坤诺说说吧。”

En: A fucking giant stick insect...
Zh: “一只该死的巨型竹节虫……”

En: Cuno's a pig now. He picks his tooth with a dirty fingernail.
Zh: “现在坤诺是一头猪了。”他用肮脏的指甲挖了挖牙齿缝。

En: Shoot, he says with a nod. "Cuno knows this shithole better than anyone."
Zh: “说吧，”他点点头。“坤诺比任何人都了解这个烂地方。”

En: Totally, pig. Cuno's in the same shit every time he's coming off speed. His tone gets parental. "You need to *medicate* that shit."
Zh: “是啊，猪猡。每次嗑完思必得，坤诺也会这个样子。”他的语气变得像个家长。“沾上那种狗屎，你只能用*药物治疗*。”

En: Mag?
Zh: “玛格？”

En: Uh... He looks confused. "Well you know, pig... Shit's fucked. And like... Cuno's got no time for this small time shit. Cuno's got *enterprises* to run."
Zh: “呃……”他看上去很困惑。“你也知道的，猪猡……都是瞎扯淡。再说……坤诺没时间搭理这些不重要的破事。坤诺有*公司*要管。”

En: What do you mean, what's going on? This is good shit. He seems surprised. "You wouldn't believe the crap Cuno's getting from the trucks."
Zh: “你说怎么了，是什么意思？这是他妈的好事啊。”他看起来有些吃惊。“你绝对不会相信，坤诺从那个卡车里弄到了什么”。

En: Cuno used to hang there sometimes. It's a real shit-hole. Everyone is old or a fucking drunk or dead, except...
Zh: “坤诺有时候会去那里玩。真是个烂地方。所有人都老了，要么就是醉醺醺的，要么就是死了，不过……”

En: What do you know about the village southwest, across the canal?
Zh: “运河对面西南方向的那个村子，你了解多少？”

En: Yeah, pig... yeah. He scratches his head. "It's a... seafort. For... It's for defence, pig. Don't bore Cuno with this historic shit."
Zh: “是啊，猪猡……没错。”他搔了搔头。“那是个……海堡。为了……为了防御的，猪猡。不要拿这种狗屁历史问题来烦坤诺。”

En: There seems to be a seafort in the bay. Do you know anything about it?
Zh: “海湾那边好像有个海堡。你知道什么吗？”

En: It's Cuno's, he says without pause or hesitation.
Zh: “那是坤诺的，”他脱口而出，没有丝毫停顿或犹豫。

En: No, it's more than that. It's like the city is speaking to me.
Zh: “不对，比这个更严重。就好像这座城市在跟我说话。”

En: Whose statue is it on the roundabout?
Zh: “环岛上那个雕像是谁？”

En: Well, I have been partying a lot lately...
Zh: “呃，我最近有点嗨过头了……”

En: You gotta hit *Magnesolam*, when you get off the train, pig. I always hit it to get the mag back.
Zh: “你清醒的时候，一定要试试*镁奥兰*，猪猡。我总是会用，把玛格拿回来。”

En: What are your thoughts on the strike?
Zh: “你对罢工有什么看法？”

En: Tell 'em Cuno sent you. They'll know what it means.
Zh: “就说是坤诺派你来的。他们知道什么意思。”

En: Magnesium, pig.
Zh: “是镁，猪猡。”

En: Ah, Cuno's not into that hallucinogenic shit -- that's for pussies.
Zh: “坤诺可不鸟什么狗屎迷幻药——那些是给胆小鬼准备的。”

En: Sure thing, pig. He nods. "What now?"
Zh: “当然了，猪猡。”他点点头。“还有什么事？”

En: No, I don't think it's actually drug related...
Zh: “不，我觉得应该跟毒品没关系……”

En: If you wanna take a real blasto, go down the coast to the old church, where the speedfreaks hang.
Zh: “要是你想来一场真正的狂欢，就去海边那个旧教堂，那帮狂飙怪人在那里鬼混。”

En: Thanks Cuno, but enough about Martinaise.
Zh: “谢了，坤诺，马丁内斯已经说够了。”

En: What's going on with the traffic jam?
Zh: “那塞车是怎么回事？”

En: Oh, pig... A clever smile runs across his face. "Cuno's done with that shit. Cuno's a pig now. Living the pig-life. That reaver shit's behind him."
Zh: “哎，猪猡……”他的脸上露出一抹机灵的笑容。“坤诺已经受够了。坤诺是头猪了。过着猪一样的生活。他后面那些该死的掠夺者。”

En: What have you gotten there?
Zh: “你弄到什么了？”

En: I've had these weird shakes recently. And something like... visions? Sounds familiar?
Zh: “我最近总是莫名其妙的发抖。有点像是……幻觉？听起来是不是很熟悉？”

En: Wha-what?! His face turns almost as red as his hair. "Are you fucking crazy, pig?! Cuno doesn't give two shits about that bird. Why do you even...?"
Zh: “什-什么？！”他的脸刷的一下变得几乎和他的头发一样红。“你他妈疯了吗，猪猡？！坤诺完全不在乎那只傻鸟。你居然敢……？”

En: Okay. Cool.
Zh: “好吧。冷静点。”

En: You know... break shit, throw shit into the sea, throw shit into the windows, throw shit at the seagulls.
Zh: “你知道的啊……把那些狗屁玩意弄坏啊，扔到海里去啊，扔东西砸窗户啊，朝海鸥扔垃圾啊。”

En: Yeah, yeah... He fidgets uncomfortably. "Of course Cuno's been there, but that was a long time ago and I was fucked. Been on the train for fucking days. Can't remember shit."
Zh: “是啊，是啊……”他有些烦躁。“坤诺当然去过了，但都是很早之前的事了，而且那时候我搞砸了。在火车上待了他妈的几天。什么他妈的都不记得了。”

En: Have you ever been there?
Zh: “你去过那里吗？”

En: You bet, pig! He appreciates your validation. "Cuno lives the life to the max. Lives every day to the mega. Cuno's in the *moment* like that."
Zh: “那是，猪猡！”他很欣赏你的肯定。“坤诺把生活过到了极致。每一天都活到最好。坤诺喜欢那种*时刻*。”

En: Cool.
Zh: “你牛。”

En: Liar. He doesn't have the guts to climb in there.
Zh: 骗子。他根本没胆量爬上去。

En: Does he have a little *crush* on Lilienne?
Zh: 他是不是对莉莉恩有点*小意思*？

En: I'm pretty sure it's of Filippe III the Squanderer, the greatest of Flippian kings of Revachol...
Zh: “我很肯定那是放荡者菲利普三世，瑞瓦肖最伟大的菲利普国王……”

En: You like Lilienne, don't you?
Zh: “你喜欢莉莉恩，是吧？”

En: Cuno ain't spoiling this shit for you. He gives you something akin to a wink. "You gotta climb in there yourself and check it out."
Zh: “坤诺不会让你扫兴的。”他可以算是朝你眨了下眼。“你自己爬上去看呗。”

En: He nods in agreement.
Zh: 他点头表示同意。

En: Goddamnit... He looks down, shaking his head. "Cuno can't believe you're making up shit about him. This needs to stop."
Zh: “该死……”他垂下眼，摇摇头。“坤诺不敢相信，你居然瞎编他的鬼话。必须停下来。”

En: Yeah? What's in there?
Zh: “是吗？发现什么了？”

En: If you know that history buff shit, then why are you fucking Cuno with this? He shrugs. "Cuno's a pig now. Has important shit on his mind. Pig shit."
Zh: “如果你懂历史，那他妈的为什么还要来烦坤诺？”他耸耸肩。“坤诺现在是头猪了。脑子里他妈的有很重要的事。都是狗屎。”

En: Cuno's been everywhere, pig.
Zh: “坤诺哪里都去过，猪猡。”

En: You ever been inside the ruined building?
Zh: “你进过那栋废弃的建筑？”

En: Anything you can tell me about the boardwalk with the ruins and the fishmarket?
Zh: “废墟和鱼市那边有条木板道，你都知道些什么？”

En: Like what?
Zh: “比如？”

En: Cuno had some business ventures set up in the neighbourhood. Had money coming in... But not anymore. He punches an invisible target in the air. "Cuno's a straight-ass pig now."
Zh: “坤诺在附近搞了个公司。有钱进账……不过现在没了。”他朝着空中看不见的目标挥了一拳头。“坤诺现在是头猪了。”

En: Cool place. Lot's of shit to do there.
Zh: “不错的地方。有很多屁事可以做。”

En: Except nothing. He shrugs. "That shit is behind Cuno. Keep your nose out of it."
Zh: “没什么。”他耸耸肩。“那堆狗屎是坤诺罩的。别多管闲事。”

En: What did *you* do there?
Zh: “那*你*在那儿做什么？”

En: Except what?
Zh: “不过什么？”

En: You know who isn't old, drunk, or dead? Lilienne.
Zh: 你知道谁不老，没有醉醺醺，也没死吗？是莉莉恩。

En: Cuno, I have couple of questions about Martinaise.
Zh: “坤诺，关于马丁内斯，我有几个问题。”

En: Let's move! [Leave.]
Zh: “我们走吧！”[离开。]

En: Where is Cunoesse?
Zh: “坤妮斯在哪？”

En: Cuno doesn't want to talk about this shit. There is a moment of thoughtful silence. He almost looks behind him.
Zh: “坤诺不想聊这些破事。”沉默降临了片刻。他回头看了看。

En: That toxic shit's behind Cuno now.
Zh: “那个有毒的狗屎现在被坤诺抛在身后了。”

En: That is a look of a man who knows he'll be looking over his shoulder for the rest of his life.
Zh: 男孩脸上露出一种表情，他知道自己余生都会小心翼翼的。

En: He unzips his jacket again and pulls the pants from the plastic wrapping. "Here pig, we both FALN now. Performance Pigs. Let's try not to shit ourselves."
Zh: 他又拉下夹克的拉链，把裤子从塑料包装里拉了出来。“好了猪猡，现在我们都是FALN了。表演的猪猡。只要别他妈的搞砸就行。”

En: I want to buy the FALN pants.
Zh: “我想买FALN裤子。”

En: A crooked little smile. "Oh fuck, he's practically dyin' to big up how he did it. Just get him to cough it up. Cuno's got your back."
Zh: 他脸上露出一丝扭曲的笑容。“卧槽，他妈的居然敢吹自己有多牛逼，他已经是个死人了。赶快让他掏钱滚蛋。我坤诺大爷罩你。”

En: Do you think he did it?
Zh: “你觉得是他做的吗？”

En: How do you think the questioning is going?
Zh: “你觉得审讯进行的怎么样了？”

En: What can I put on him, to get him to confess?
Zh: “我应该怎么给他施压，让他招供？”

En: I'm trying to get him to confess...
Zh: “我想让他招供……”

En: I'm slapping myself to get ideas!
Zh: “我扇自己耳光是为了找灵感！”

En: Okay, let's do this. [Leave.]
Zh: “好吧，就这么干吧。”[离开。]

En: Okay, so, we've got the old fuck. The kid whispers, his eyes bugging out of his skull with excitement.
Zh: “好吧，这样，就用该死的老一套。”小孩窃窃私语，眼睛因为兴奋圆睁。
